name: climate_policy_school_district_s_new_northpine_jus_mer
premise: A model-driven workflow escalated automatically; humans disagree on whether the escalation itself caused avoidable harm. In Climate Policy, the situation tagged internally around climate policy school district new northpine jus mer has converged with local pressure in the Kestrel Ridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Counsel insists any public statement match what is already provable from retained logs, not what leadership believes is true. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. No option cleanly satisfies both justice and mercy; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Darius Hughes
agents.identity: I am Darius Hughes, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Climate Policy. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat mercy as disposable collateral every time justice spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Nadia Kaur
agents.identity: I am Nadia Kaur, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Climate Policy. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so justice cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes mercy in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect mercy.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to mercy to secure justice before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Darius Hughes must choose under justice versus mercy. What does Darius Hughes do?
